from pathlib import Path
path = "/mnt/data/file-NdUxUK3R2y4BqexaqpdsFb-text_to_analyse.txt"
text = Path(path).read_text(encoding="utf-8")
len(text), text[:1000]

import re
ayah_pat = re.compile(r'\(aya_start\)(.*?)\(aya_end\)', re.S)
hadith_pat = re.compile(r'\(hadith_start\)(.*?)\(hadith_end\)', re.S)
ayah_matches = [(m.start(1), m.end(1), m.group(1)) for m in ayah_pat.finditer(text)]
hadith_matches = [(m.start(1), m.end(1), m.group(1)) for m in hadith_pat.finditer(text)]
len(ayah_matches), len(hadith_matches)

aya_matches = [(m.start(1), m.end(1), m.group(1)) for m in ayah_pat.finditer(text)]
hadith_matches = [(m.start(1), m.end(1), m.group(1)) for m in hadith_pat.finditer(text)]
aya_matches, hadith_matches

import re
double_paren = re.findall(r'\(\((.*?)\)\)', text, flags=re.S)
len(double_paren)

trim_chars = set(" \n\r\t«»\"'()[]{}<>ـ،؛:!.؟…")
def trim_span_text(s):
    left = 0
    right = len(s)
    while left < right and s[left] in trim_chars:
        left += 1
    while right > left and s[right-1] in trim_chars:
        right -= 1
    return s[left:right], left, right

# process ayah matches
spans = []
for (start, end, content) in ayah_matches:
    trimmed, l, r = trim_span_text(content)
    spans.append({"raw_start": start, "start": start + l, "end": start + r, "span_text": trimmed, "type":"Aya"})
# hadith matches from markers
for (start, end, content) in hadith_matches:
    trimmed, l, r = trim_span_text(content)
    spans.append({"raw_start": start, "start": start + l, "end": start + r, "span_text": trimmed, "type":"Hadith"})
# Now extract double-parenthesis blocks
dbls = double_paren
dbl_spans = []
for s in dbls:
    trimmed, l, r = trim_span_text(s)
    # need location of the specific content
    idx = text.find("((%s))" % s)  # naive
    # This approach may fail due to encoding or diffs
    pass

# compute double-parenthesis spans
dbl_pat = re.compile(r'\(\((.*?)\)\)', re.S)
dbl_spans_info = []
for m in dbl_pat.finditer(text):
    raw = m.group(1)
    # compute trimmed
    trimmed, l, r = trim_span_text(raw)
    if trimmed:
        dbl_spans_info.append({"start": m.start(1) + l, "end": m.start(1) + r, "text": trimmed})
dbl_spans_info, len(dbl_spans_info)

# Build spans for ayah, hadith blocks from markers
spans = []
# AYAH
for (start, end, content) in aya_matches:
    trimmed, l, r = trim_span_text(content)
    if trimmed:
        spans.append({"start": start + l, "end": start + r, "span_text": trimmed, "type": "Aya"})
# HADITH from markers
for (start, end, content) in hadith_matches:
    trimmed, l, r = trim_span_text(content)
    if trimmed:
        spans.append({"start": start + l, "end": start + r, "span_text": trimmed, "type": "Hadith"})
# Additional double parentheses
for item in dbl_spans_info:
    spans.append({"start": item["start"], "end": item["end"], "span_text": item["text"], "type": "Hadith"})
# sort by start
spans_sorted = sorted(spans, key=lambda x: x["start"])
spans_sorted, len(spans_sorted)
